current.headline: Grayscale says bitcoin needs other buyers to find a sustainable bottom amid Strategy BTC sale
current.summary: Grayscale said Strategy's ability to accumulate more bitcoin is limited at the current STRC and MSTR share prices.

items.headline: Polymarket says No for May, Yes for June after Strategy's recent bitcoin sale
items.summary: UMA voters ruled that Strategy's June 1 disclosure counted for the June contract, even though the company said it sold bitcoin during the final week of May.

items.headline: Strategy Wanted to Inoculate the Bitcoin Market - Has Its BTC Sale Backfired?
items.summary: With STRC trading under $100, experts debated whether the sale exposed a structural crack in Strategy's Bitcoin flywheel.

items.headline: Bitcoin's dearth of fresh investors matters more than Strategy's sale, Citi says
items.summary: Citi said Strategy's bitcoin sale rattled markets, but missing demand from new buyers may matter more.

items.headline: Strategy Shares Fall for Second Straight Day After $56 Billion Bitcoin Giant Sells BTC
items.summary: Strategy shares extended losses after the Bitcoin treasury firm sold BTC.

items.headline: Will Strategy's Peers Dump Bitcoin Now? Not So Fast, Analysts Say
items.summary: Analysts said investors should evaluate each company's financial position rather than assume a wave of treasury sales.

items.headline: Polymarket faces backlash over disputed Strategy bitcoin sale market
items.summary: Polymarket users pushed back after betting on whether Strategy sold any bitcoin by May 31.

items.headline: Michael Saylor breaks silence after Strategy sells $2.5 million in bitcoin
items.summary: Saylor said Strategy aims to make STRC a leading credit instrument after the company sold bitcoin to fund preferred stock distributions.

items.headline: Strategy sparks panic with bitcoin sale, but analysts say it was immaterial
items.summary: Analysts debated whether Strategy's sale signaled willingness to use BTC holdings to support its capital structure.

items.headline: Strategy bitcoin sale timing throws wrench into $20 million Polymarket pool
items.summary: A Polymarket pool asking whether Strategy would sell bitcoin before May 31 drew more than $20 million in trading volume.

items.headline: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strategy Sells 32 BTC for $2.5M
items.summary: Strategy sold 32 BTC, breaking its long-standing never-sell stance.
